meaning: n.(in ～ of)不顾,不管,敌意v.困扰
examples: In spite of great peril, I have survived.
Never had she met such spite and pettiness.
In spite of my outward calm I was very shaken.
In spite of his low approval ratings, a huge majority of registered voters opposed the recall.
In spite of huge gas reserves, Libya's power plants mostly run on diesel fuel.
